EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface ICircularArc

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides access to members that control properties of circular arcs.

[Guid("991F5C10-BC4C-11D0-8303-0000F8034032")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface ICircularArc : ICurve, IGeometry

Properties

CenterPoint

The center point.

IPoint CenterPoint { get; }

Property Value

IPoint

Examples

Sample Snippet

CentralAngle

The included (or central) angle.

double CentralAngle { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

ChordHeight

The chord height (assigning preserves endpoints, and orientation unless chord height is < 0).

double ChordHeight { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

Dimension 

esriGeometryDimension Dimension { get; }

Property Value

esriGeometryDimension

Envelope 

IEnvelope Envelope { get; }

Property Value

IEnvelope

FromAngle

The angle, measured from a horizontal line through this circular arc's center point, that defines where this arc starts.

double FromAngle { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

FromPoint 

IPoint FromPoint { get; set; }

Property Value

IPoint

GeometryType 

esriGeometryType GeometryType { get; }

Property Value

esriGeometryType

IsClosed 

bool IsClosed { get; }

Property Value

bool

IsCounterClockwise

Indicates if this circular is oriented counter-clockwise from its 'from' point to its 'to' point.

bool IsCounterClockwise { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

IsEmpty 

bool IsEmpty { get; }

Property Value

bool

IsLine

Indicates if the arc has degenerated to a line (radius is infinite).

bool IsLine { get; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

IsMinor

Indicates whether this circular arc is a minor arc or a major arc.

bool IsMinor { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

IsPoint

Indicates if the arc has degenerated to a point (radius is 0).

bool IsPoint { get; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

Length 

double Length { get; }

Property Value

double

Radius

The radius.

double Radius { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Sample Snippet

SpatialReference 

ISpatialReference SpatialReference { get; set; }

Property Value

ISpatialReference

ToAngle

The angle, measured from a horizontal line through this circular arc's center point, that defines where this arc ends.

double ToAngle { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Sample Snippet

ToPoint 

IPoint ToPoint { get; set; }

IPoint

Methods

Complement()

Changes this arc into its complement; 'from' and 'to' points are unchanged.

void Complement()
